title: Further information
description: Additional information on self-education expenses and guide to depreciating assets.

items: Taxation Ruling TR 98/9 Income tax: deductibility of self-education expenses incurred by an employee or a person in business.
Guide to depreciating assets about deductions for decline in value, balancing adjustments and immediate deductions for certain depreciating assets.

content_text:
